user.title: Centurion Garage Door
user.description: Enter the details for your Centurion Garage Door controller.

data_description.host: The IP address or hostname of the controller (e.g. 192.168.1.100)
data_description.api_key: The API key shown in the controller's web interface

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the device. Check the IP address and ensure the device is online.
